note.zh: 在 Cursor 中以 Gemini 3.5 Flash 默认设置一次生成。本页为未经修改的原始产出。包含基于柏林噪声的无限三维体素地形，自动爬坡（Step Climb）物理碰撞，Web Audio API 合成的风声/方块破坏/放置/跳跃音效及五重和弦背景合成乐。内置了世界之树、天空太阳神殿、黑曜石火山龙巢、悬浮精灵柱四处规模宏大、细节饱满的神话遗迹，并配备一键折跃与二维小地图罗盘导航。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Gemini 3.5 Flash inside Cursor with default settings. Unmodified raw output featuring an infinite 3D voxel terrain driven by Perlin noise, responsive step-climbing collision physics, and synthesized sound effects (block breaking, placing, jumping) alongside a 5-chord ambient synth soundtrack via Web Audio API. Built-in with four massive, highly detailed mythical landmarks — Yggdrasil, the Aether Sun Temple, the Obsidian Volcano Keep, and the Floating Elven Spires — complete with instant travel Codex and 2D minimap compass navigation.

note.zh: 在 Cursor 中以 Gemini 3.5 Flash 默认设置一次生成。本页为原始未经修改的产出，具有极高精细度的矢量细节、生动的动画感构图以及富有趣味性的画面彩蛋（如鹈鹕喉囊里的小鱼）。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Gemini 3.5 Flash inside Cursor with default settings. Unmodified raw output featuring extremely rich vector details, dynamic composition, and delightful visual easter eggs like the swallowed fish in the gular pouch.
